El Taller Escuela Ursi Galletti se funda: The Ursi Galletti Workshop School was founded in Caracas, Venezuela in 1991 by the Venezuelan jeweler Ursi Galletti. Until then, he had dedicated himself to the training and education of jewelers. Currently, the school is located in Houston, Texas, where workshops and courses on training and specialization in the different areas of jewelry are still being offered.
Contamos con un Taller con una Capacidad: We have a workshop with a capacity for 4 students, with all the necessary tools and equipment, and we also offer many alternative courses in addition to the jewelry course
Esmalte sobre metal, Metal Clay, Resina,: Enamel on metal, Metal Clay, Resin, wood, wirework and many more are the alternatives we offer you
A partir del año 2010 el Taller Escuela: Starting from the year 2010 the Workshop School internationalized and began to give an annual tour titled (workshop in motion) teaching classes in Miami, Orlando, Houston, Atlanta, Puerto Rico, Panama City until 2015 when it established residence in Houston Tx
En nuestra escuela podemos decir con org: In our school we can say with pride that we have formed competent jewelry designers and jewelers who today have their niche in the jewelry market
No esperes mas si quieres aprender con c: Don't wait any longer if you want to learn this artisanal craft with quality come with us, we are waiting for you
Ursi Galletti nace en Caracas en el año: Ursi Galletti is born in Caracas in the year 1963, starts in the world of jewelry making in the year 1987, receiving the first instruction in the craft by the jeweler Carlos Domínguez, Lucero Tamayo in Enamel on Metal and Edith Piguillin in Art Clay, in his early years he dedicated himself to research and experimentation inside his workshop.
En el año 1991 crea la academia URSI GAL: In 1991 he creates the academy URSI GALLETTI WORKSHOP SCHOOL, he felt motivated to do it in view of the fact that in the country there were no academies that taught Jewelry in a more professional way and making use of study programs with levels and specializations, thus becoming one of the first schools in the city of Caracas and the country.
En 1996 fue merecedor del Premio Naciona: In 1996 he was awarded the National Prize (accésit) of the Fire Arts and from then on he began to participate in the most important salons and biennials both nationally and the participation in the “National Salon of the Fire Arts” for many years and The “Biennial of Puerto La Cruz” among others, as well as participations in important International exhibitions, such as
Mientras mejoraba y perfeccionaba sus té: While improving and perfecting his techniques he recreated memories of his childhood in the metal, due to the close relationship he had with the Pemon ethnic group from his early years of life until entering adolescence, all that experience of many years has been objects of inspiration in his artistic work, the figure of the Shaman his ornamentation for rituals and all the magic and mystery that surrounded the action were converted into a constant in his work, using unconventional elements such as bones, seeds, feathers plus the intervention of fire and the skills of the metallurgist to transform all these elements into beautiful pieces of jewelry, with exhibition purposes, which has made him worthy of important awards and participation in national as well as international exhibitions.
En el año 1996 a 1998 creo y dirigió un: In the year 1996 to 1998 he created and directed a training project in artisanal trades and improvement aimed at artisans in the Catia area in Caracas, one of the popular areas with the highest population per square meter and another special artisanal program for the foundation of the mayor's office that had a program for training Street Children, this project was part of a government plan of the Caracas Mayor's Office with Mayor Antonio Ledezma, Fundarte and AVAF, the participants simultaneously received training in the area of administration and production for small artisanal business.
Desde el año 2015 Ursi Galletti fijo su: Since the year 2015, Ursi Galletti has established his residence in the city of Houston Tx, where he installed his Workshop School at Plazamerica Mall and continues with his academic, exhibition, and repair services.
Realiza talleres intensivos en otros lug: He conducts intensive workshops in other places such as Miami, Orlando, Panama and Puerto Rico from the year 2011 until then
Creación de programas de Estudios y Pens: Creation of Study programs and Curriculum in traditional trades.
25 años como instructor del Oficio de la: 25 years as an instructor of the Craft of Jewelry Making.
Creación de 4 Talleres - Escuela en Vene: Creation of 4 Workshops - School in Venezuela
